basic_details.job_title: PAU Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of PAU. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PAU Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: First class Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/Computer Applications, Master's degree in Computer Science/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/Computer Applications, Knowledge of Punjabi upto Matric Level
qualification.details: First class Bachelor's Degree with subject of Computer Science/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/Computer Applications. Master's degree with subject of Computer Science/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/Computer Applications. Knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric Level.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PAU Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) recruitment is 10-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First class Bachelor's Degree and a Master's degree in Computer Science/Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology/Computer Applications, along with knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric Level.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for this recruitment is between 18 years and 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline by sending the filled application form along with required documents to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the PAU Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 200/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a contractual position at Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Technical Assistant (Artificial Intelligence).
